message:
feat(guardian,store,cli): implement autopilot mode (bd-3e2.3)

Add autopilot module with evaluation functions for account switching,
workload balancing, and cost optimization. Includes autopilot_decisions
migration, store methods for decision logging, and CLI commands for
status/decisions/summary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+-- Migration 014: Autopilot decisions log
+-- Created: 2026-01-30
+-- Purpose: Track autopilot decisions for auditing and review
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS autopilot_decisions (
+    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
+    decision_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+    reason TEXT NOT NULL,
+    confidence DOUBLE NOT NULL,
+    executed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
+    decided_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp,
+    details_json TEXT
+);
